description_en: San Diego may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 20 halal restaurants and 4 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore San Diego, the United States, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to San Diego: 27 halal restaurants listed, 4 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
